x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Processing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Converts accumulated points or rewards into the chosen form of value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility & Conditions
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures the customer meets the requirements for redemption.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance Management
x-enumeration-literals.description: Updates the customers reward or points balance after redemption.

x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintains records of redeemed rewards for customer transparency and bank reporting.
